input: Create a cold email sequence for a VP of Engineering at a Series B fintech company. We sell observability tools and they recently had a public outage.
Generate A/B test variants for a LinkedIn connection request targeting CTOs. Our product is an AI code review tool.
Our email open rate is 45% but reply rate is 2%. Diagnose the problem and suggest improvements.
Build a 14-day multi-touch sequence combining email, LinkedIn, and phone for enterprise deals (ACV $50K+).
Analyze these 3 outreach templates and tell me which one will perform best for reaching marketing directors at DTC brands.
